meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve no design skills (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no design skills. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Git with AI: Solving Design Challenges for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master Git with AI to bypass design roadblocks. A technical case study for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-end SaaS projects faster.
content.answer_block: You don't need a degree in UI/UX to ship professional interfaces. By leveraging Git-integrated AI workflows with Antigravity and Claude Code, you can transform functional code into polished, design-system-compliant applications. This approach treats design as a programmable asset, allowing you to iterate at the speed of thought without manual design fatigue.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the logic is sound, but the UI looks like a relic from 1998. The client is waiting, the deadline is breathing down your neck, and your 'design skills' are non-existent. You’re a builder, not a pixel-pusher, but in today’s market, the gap between 'working code' and 'shippable product' is entirely aesthetic.

The secret isn't learning Figma—it's mastering the AI-Git feedback loop. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you turn your repository into a living design engine. We’re going to strip away the design friction and replace it with automated, component-driven development that makes you look like a full-stack veteran.

steps.title: Initialize Design-System Context
steps.description: Establish a base design system in your repository so the AI understands your stylistic constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a tailwind.config.js and a global CSS file that implements a professional, modern SaaS color palette and typography scale. Define a set of reusable UI component classes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply design system styles to current repo'

steps.title: Scaffold UI from Functional Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your existing logic to semantic UI components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the existing functional components into semantic HTML/React components using the established design system. Ensure accessibility and responsive layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor components to match design system'

steps.title: Automated Visual Regression Testing
steps.description: Use Git hooks to ensure AI-generated changes don't break your layout.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Playwright test suite that takes screenshots of key components and compares them against baseline snapshots to prevent visual regression.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create visual regression test script'

steps.title: Iterative Design Refinement
steps.description: Continuously refine the look and feel using natural language prompts inside the Git workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current dashboard layout. Increase whitespace, improve vertical rhythm, and apply a subtle glassmorphism effect to the primary cards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refine layout for better whitespace and professional look'

steps.title: Commit and Deploy with AI Context
steps.description: Generate intelligent commit messages that document the design evolution for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the design changes made in this session and generate a detailed Git commit message that explains the 'why' behind the visual updates.

pro_tips: Always define a 'design token' file early; it prevents the AI from hallucinating inconsistent colors or spacing.
Use Claude Code's 'edit' mode to perform bulk refactors across the entire codebase to maintain visual consistency.
Inject your client's brand guidelines as a markdown file in the root directory so the AI references it on every prompt.
Leverage Git branches for 'Design Experiments' so you can roll back instantly if an AI-driven layout change breaks usability.
Automate your CSS minification and purging via Git pre-push hooks to ensure your AI-built UI remains performant.
content.next_steps: Once your design workflow is automated, implement a CI/CD pipeline that runs your visual regression tests on every push. This ensures that as you add features, your UI remains pixel-perfect without manual intervention.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the UI and start building the future. By automating your design process, you reclaim hours of billable time and deliver work that rivals top-tier agencies. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
